headline: Peloton appoints fitness industry veteran Sarah Robb O'Hagan as Chief Content and Member Development Officer, succeeding Jen Cotter.
investor_impact: The appointment of Sarah Robb O'Hagan brings significant industry pedigree (ex-Equinox, Flywheel, Gatorade) to Peloton's content and member strategy. This leadership upgrade is a positive signal for turnaround efforts and subscriber engagement, though investors will monitor execution during the transition.
key_figures: March 31, 2026 (Jen Cotter transitions to advisory role)
April 1, 2026 (Sarah Robb O'Hagan effective start date)
12 months base salary continuation for Cotter
18 months maximum COBRA continuation coverage for Cotter
